summary_ja: Raw backlog ingest: 5 articles triaged. 2 takes (Arcee AI podcast, Shopify/Latent Space podcast) created 5 new entity pages and enriched 4 existing pages. 3 skips (1 non-AI physics article, 2 duplicates).

decisions.title: Airfoil - Bartosz Ciechanowski
decisions.reason_ja: 物理学・空力学の教育用インタラクティブ記事。AI/LLM/エージェントと無関係。
decisions.body_excerpt: The dream of soaring in the sky like a bird has captivated the human mind for ages.

decisions.title: Arcee AI goes all-in on open models built in the U.S.
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★★ Arcee AIのTrinity Large（400B/13B MoE）、Muonオプティマイザー、22,048 B300 GPUでのトレーニング詳細。Nathan LambertのInterconnectsポッドキャスト転載。新エンティティページ作成済み（arcee-ai, lucas-atkins, mark-mcquade）。
decisions.body_excerpt: Arcee AI is a the startup I've found to be taking the most real approach to monetizing their open models.

decisions.title: Arcee AI goes all-in on open models built in the U.S.

decisions.body_excerpt: Arcee AI is a the startup I've found to be taking the most real approach to monetizing their open models.

decisions.title: Shopify's AI Phase Transition: 2026 Usage Explosion, Unlimited Opus-4.6 Token Budget, Tangle, Tangent, SimGym - with Mikhail Parakhin, Shopify CTO
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★★ ShopifyのAIインフラ（Tangle/Tangent/SimGym）、Mikhail Parakhin CTOのインタビュー。Liquid AIの実稼働デプロイ、トークン制限なしポリシー、96%自律コーディング目標。新エンティティページ（mikhail-parakhin, liquid-ai）、既存ページ（shopify-ai-engineering, shopify）大幅強化。
